title: palmijuncus pallens
side_effects: Palmijuncus pallens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Overuse of the plant's extracts can lead to symptoms like dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to palmijuncus pallens can cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even neurological disorders like seizures and convulsions. Improper handling and use of the plant can also trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
